title: Putin's playbook - Sarah Paine
summary: Dwarkesh Patel interviews Sarah Paine on a YouTube podcast to discuss Putin's strategic approach and geopolitical playbook. The episode focuses on understanding Russian strategic thinking and decision-making patterns.
